items.markdown:
![Madurai to Rameshwaram Taxi | Starting from ₹2750 | RBC Travels](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/05080514-1420-0139-0000-38fa31b432e5:4)
Taxis from Madurai to Rameshwaram are readily available, covering the ~173 km distance in approximately 3 to 3.5 hours. `One-way taxi fares typically start around ₹2,000–₹2,500 for a sedan and ₹3,500+ for an SUV` , with popular providers including MakeMyTrip, Goibibo, and Uber Intercity.[[1]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/madurai-rameshwaram-cab-services.html)[[2]](https://www.uber.com/in/en/r/intercity/madurai-tamil-nadu-to-rameswaram-tamil-nadu/)[[3]](https://hurryupcabs.com/outstation/madurai-to-rameshwaram)[[4]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/innovacrysta-car-from-madurai-to-rameshwaram/)[[5]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/innova-cabs-from-madurai-to-rameshwaram.html)

**Key Details for Booking:** 

- **Distance/Time:** 173–187 km, 3–3.5 hours.
- **Cab Types:** Hatchback, Sedan (e.g., Dzire/Etios), SUVs (e.g., Innova/Ertiga).
- **Estimated Rates:** 
	- **Sedan:** Starts from ₹2,000–₹2,400.
	- **SUV:** Starts from ₹3,500.
- **Options:** One-way drop, round trip, and 24/7 availability.[[1]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/madurai-rameshwaram-cab-services.html)[[2]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/madurai-to-rameshwaram-cabs/)[[3]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/innova-car-from-madurai-to-rameshwaram/)[[4]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/innovacrysta-car-from-madurai-to-rameshwaram/)[[5]](https://hurryupcabs.com/outstation/madurai-to-rameshwaram)[[6]](https://www.uber.com/in/en/r/intercity/madurai-tamil-nadu-to-rameswaram-tamil-nadu/)

**Top Booking Options:** 

- [MakeMyTrip](https://www.google.com/search?q=MakeMyTrip&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwiKwNumz6iUAxV0nf0HHe4xJCEQgK4QegYIAQgCEAU) : Rates from ₹2249, includes sedan and SUV options.
- [Goibibo](https://www.google.com/search?q=Goibibo&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwiKwNumz6iUAxV0nf0HHe4xJCEQgK4QegYIAQgCEAc) : Rates from ₹2061 with various coupon codes.
- [Uber Intercity](https://www.google.com/search?q=Uber+Intercity&csui=3&hl=en&gl=IN&uule=w+CAIQICIFSW5kaWE&ved=2ahUKEwiKwNumz6iUAxV0nf0HHe4xJCEQgK4QegYIAQgCEAk) : Approximately ₹3722 for comfortable, pre-booked rides.
- **Local Taxi Services:** Many private, local operators offer 1-day tour packages.[[1]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/madurai-rameshwaram-cab-services.html)[[2]](https://www.goibibo.com/cars/innovacrysta-car-from-madurai-to-rameshwaram/)[[3]](https://www.uber.com/in/en/r/intercity/madurai-tamil-nadu-to-rameswaram-tamil-nadu/)[[4]](https://maduraitorameshwaramtaxi.com/)

*Note: Prices are subject to change based on demand, car type, and operator. Always check for applied coupons (e.g., "CABTRIP" for ₹500 off on MakeMyTrip).* [[1]](https://www.makemytrip.com/car-rental/madurai-rameshwaram-cab-services.html)
